expected_compress_skips.rar: intentionally unsupported: rar create is not supported
expected_compress_skips.zipx: intentionally unsupported: zipx is extract-only; use zip --codec zstd
expected_compress_skips.tar: intentionally unsupported: tar create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.tar.gz: intentionally unsupported: tar.gz create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.tar.bz2: intentionally unsupported: tar.bz2 create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.tar.xz: intentionally unsupported: tar.xz create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.gz: intentionally unsupported: gz create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.bz2: intentionally unsupported: bz2 create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.xz: intentionally unsupported: xz create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.zst: intentionally unsupported: zst create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.cso: intentionally unsupported: cso create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.wia: intentionally unsupported: wia create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.tgc: intentionally unsupported: tgc create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.wbfs: intentionally unsupported: wbfs create is disabled
expected_compress_skips.xiso: intentionally unsupported: xiso is trim-only and not a compress format
expected_compress_skips.pbp: intentionally unsupported: pbp create is not supported
expected_compress_skips.gcz: intentionally unsupported: gcz compression is not supported (use rvz)
expected_compress_skips.nfs: intentionally unsupported: nfs compression is not supported

expected_patch_create_skips.ips: intentionally skipped: 128 MiB benchmark inputs exceed the IPS 24-bit offset limit
expected_patch_create_skips.ebp: intentionally skipped: 128 MiB benchmark inputs exceed the EBP 24-bit offset limit
expected_patch_create_skips.ninja1: intentionally unsupported: NINJA1 patch creation is not supported
expected_patch_create_skips.bsp: intentionally unsupported: BSP patch creation is not implemented
expected_patch_create_skips.hdiffpatch: intentionally unsupported: HDiffPatch/HPatchZ patch creation is disabled
